name: Lactobacillus Probiotic
summary: Decision-ready summary: Lactobacillus Probiotic is best framed for antibiotic-associated diarrhea context; IBS symptom support; gut microbiome support; safety screen: severely immunocompromised; central line; critical illness.
description: Lactobacillus probiotics may improve gut barrier function and microbial balance, which can reduce diarrhea risk and symptoms in select IBS phenotypes.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: Use only with clinician oversight in severe immunocompromise
invasive infection is rare but documented for probiotic organisms.
